case_title: APOYO FINCIERO INC VS. JUAN MANUEL NUNEZ BARAJAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00 SERVED JUL-22-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARAJAS, JUAN MANUEL NUNEZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINCIERO INC AS TO DEFENDANT BARAJAS, JUAN MANUEL NUNEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINCIERO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARAJAS, JUAN MANUEL NUNEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,725.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINCIERO INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE AT APOYO FINCIERO, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JUAN MANUEL NUNEZ BARAJAS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D506).
